note: Weights trained on 'ikaros', evaluated on 'daedalus'. local_live = this die's OWN live body key; saved_key = the transplanted die-A key vector. On a foreign die, local_live should blow up (the body can't reproduce die-A's key) while saved_key still works (weights intact) -> the model needs die-A's PHYSICAL body, not just its weights.
